_doc: Active-broker selection for the QF Order Plane. Defaults are wired in server/order/brokers-config.ts; missing keys here use those defaults. Schwab routes through the Python NT bridge (QF-237) over NATS — flipping enabled=true requires a running quantfoundry-schwab-nt service on the credential host and a reachable NATS connection (refuses-to-start guard in server/index.ts §8). Multi-account shape added in QF-243; the legacy single-object shape (brokers.schwab.enabled) is still accepted and synthesises a default account.
